flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Central Ohio Technical College rose 117% between 2021 and 2024 (46.0% → 100.0%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Central Ohio Technical College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.5% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Central Ohio Technical College rose 50% between 2006 and 2009 (12.9% → 19.3%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Central Ohio Technical College rose 16% between 2021 and 2024 (1.7k → 1.9k).
